name: Oatmeal Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine oats and butter/sour milk in a small bowl. Mix well and let stand for 1 hour.
2. Sift together flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt; set aside.
3. Cream together butter and brown sugar in a mixing bowl using an electric mixer at medium speed.
4. Add egg; beat until light and fluffy.
5. Add dry ingredients alternately with the oat mixture to the creamed mixture, blending well after each addition.
6. Spoon batter into greased 2 1/2-inch muffin pan cups, filling them about 2/3 full.
7. Bake in a 400 degree F oven for 20 minutes or until golden brown.
8. Serve hot with homemade jam or preserves.
